description_en: Product name. Do not translate or transliterate.

A PopClip add-on / plug-in. NOT a file-name extension (e.g. .txt) — never use the file-suffix term.

A short text/YAML config that defines an extension.
A text string identifying an icon, e.g. symbol:star (Icon Specifier).
A special permission an extension declares (e.g. network access).
A condition controlling where PopClip appears (URL rule / app rule).
Extension Info field: where the extension came from (built-in, directory, etc.).
Extension Info field: how the extension was installed (snippet, file, URL scheme, etc.).
Code-signed; has a valid digital signature. NOT signed in / signed up.
Has no code signature.
Code signature / digital signature of an extension.
Code signature verified as authentic.
Authenticate to a service.
End the authenticated session.
A small image/glyph used for an action.

Icon editor control: rotation.
Icon editor control: mirror the icon.
A new version of an App or extension ready to install.
Settings section title: visual appearance (dark/light, color, size).
Appearance mode that follows the system. Keep Auto and Auto (Inverse) consistent.
